subcodes.first_line: O ye companions of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Praise be to God that ye have become intoxicated from the cup of His bounty, and are among the intimates at the feast of the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء حمد خدا را که از کاس عنایت سرمست شدید و در بزم الست محرمان
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consolation and comfort
